description_long: This stuffed toy is designed to resemble SpongeBob SquarePants, featuring a rectangular, yellow, sponge-like body with rounded edges and multiple circular holes. The face is highly expressive, with large, round blue eyes, prominent eyelashes, a wide open mouth showing a pink tongue and two large front teeth, and a red tie below the mouth. The toy has thin, outstretched arms ending in four-fingered hands, and thin legs with white socks, brown shorts, and black shoes. The back of the toy is plain yellow with a few holes, while the sides show the thickness of the sponge body and the protruding nose. The overall appearance is playful and cartoonish, with a soft, plush texture and vibrant colors.
description: A plush SpongeBob SquarePants toy with a yellow, hole-filled body, expressive face, and outstretched arms and legs in cartoon attire.
description_view_0: Front view shows the smiling face, large eyes, red tie, and outstretched arms and legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the thickness of the sponge body, protruding nose, and profile of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Back view displays the plain yellow back with a few holes and the brown shorts, with arms and legs visible from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side profile of the face, nose, and limbs.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is cheerful and happy, with wide open eyes, raised eyebrows, and a big open-mouthed smile showing a pink tongue and two prominent front teeth.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms stretched out horizontally and both legs straight down.
